name: Grounded Pet Shampoo Unscented - 1l
description: All-Natural, Non-Toxic Care for Your Furry Friends Pamper your pets with Grounded Pet Shampoo, a luxurious, all-natural shampoo crafted specifically for dogs and cats. Made from a vegan castille soap base, this gentle formula creates a rich lather that soothes and moisturizes your pet’s fur and skin, leaving them clean, fresh, and happy. Key Ingredients: Concentrated Liquid Soap : Derived from saponified coconut, sunflower, and canola oils for a gentle yet effective cleanse. Glycerin : Helps to lock in moisture, ensuring your pet’s coat remains soft and shiny. Instructions for Use: Wet your pet’s coat thoroughly. Dilute the shampoo with water in a pitcher, then pour it over your pet and lather up. Alternatively, you can squeeze a small amount directly onto their coat and work into a lather. Rinse thoroughly to reveal a clean, healthy coat. Proudly MADE IN KENYA by Grounded, our pet shampoo is a responsible choice for environmentally conscious pet owners. Treat your beloved pets to the natural care they deserve with Grounded Pet Shampoo!
